title: Rethinking the Value of Multi-Agent Workflow: A Strong Single Agent Baseline
implication: Single-agent forte deve ser baseline obrigatorio antes de MAS homogeneo.

title: Do More Agents Help? Controlled and Protocol-Aligned Evaluation of LLM Agent Workflows
implication: MAS homogeneo raramente vence baseline single-agent quando loader, tools, answer contract e logging sao normalizados.

title: On the Uncertainty of Large Language Model-Based Multi-Agent Systems
implication: Mais agentes e mais rodadas nao garantem ganho; a incerteza inicial e a base do modelo pesam muito.

title: From Static Templates to Dynamic Runtime Graphs: A Survey of Workflow Optimization for LLM Agents
implication: Separar template reutilizavel, realized graph e execution trace como entidades distintas.

title: GraphBit: A Graph-based Agentic Framework for Non-Linear Agent Orchestration
implication: Grafo/DAG deterministico reduz routing alucinado, loops e execucao nao reproduzivel.

title: Verified Multi-Agent Orchestration: A Plan-Execute-Verify-Replan Framework for Complex Query Resolution
implication: Verifier e replan devem fazer parte do loop, nao so reviewer no final.

title: AgentBeats: Agentifying Agent Assessment for Openness, Standardization, and Reproducibility
implication: Avaliar agentes via protocolos padronizados, traces e judge agents para reduzir mismatch entre benchmark e producao.

title: MPAC: A Multi-Principal Agent Coordination Protocol for Interoperable Multi-Agent Collaboration
implication: Shared state entre agentes de donos diferentes precisa de intent, conflict, governance e optimistic concurrency.

title: MemFlow: Intent-Driven Memory Orchestration for Small Language Model Agents
implication: Memoria deve ser roteada por intencao e budget, nao exposta como RAG plano.

title: MemRouter: Memory-as-Embedding Routing for Long-Term Conversational Agents
implication: Write-side memory admission pode ser leve, roteada por embedding e separada da geracao de resposta.

title: Experience Compression Spectrum: Unifying Memory, Skills, and Rules in LLM Agents
implication: Memoria, skills e regras sao niveis de compressao; o Forge deve modelar promocao e autoridade entre niveis.

title: Kimi K2.5: Visual Agentic Intelligence
implication: Swarm paralelo paga quando existe decomposicao heterogenea, multimodalidade e paralelismo real.

title: K-BrowseComp: A Web Browsing Agent Benchmark Grounded in Korean Contexts
implication: Benchmarks locais e nao ingleses expõem gaps escondidos por avaliacao ocidental/inglesa.

title: EvoBrowseComp: Benchmarking Search Agents on Evolving Knowledge
implication: Benchmarks de search agents precisam ser atualizaveis para evitar contaminacao e memorizacao.

title: Agents-K1: Towards Agent-native Knowledge Orchestration
implication: Research agents precisam de grafos de conhecimento com entidades, claims, evidencia e linhagem de metodo, nao so abstracts e embeddings.

title: Efficient Serving for Dynamic Agent Workflows with Prediction-based KV-Cache Management
implication: Custo e latencia precisam conhecer estrutura de workflow, nao so recencia de cache.

title: Security Threat Modeling for Emerging AI-Agent Protocols: A Comparative Analysis of MCP, A2A, Agora, and ANP
implication: Protocolos agenticos precisam threat model de identidade, lifecycle, composicao e execucao errada de tool.

title: Breaking the Protocol: Security Analysis of the Model Context Protocol Specification and Prompt Injection Vulnerabilities in Tool-Integrated LLM Agents
implication: MCP precisa capability attestation, message authentication e defesa contra trust propagation implicito.

title: AIP: Agent Identity Protocol for Verifiable Delegation Across MCP and A2A
implication: Delegacao precisa ligar identidade, escopo, invocacao e provenance com tokens assinados.

title: AgentRFC: Security Design Principles and Conformance Testing for Agent Protocols
implication: Composicao entre protocolos pode quebrar garantias locais; usar conformance tests e invariantes.

title: What Challenges Do Developers Face in AI Agent Systems? An Empirical Study on Stack Overflow
implication: Comunidade dev sofre com runtime integration, dependency management, orchestration complexity e evaluation reliability.

title: AIRA: AI-Induced Risk Audit: A Structured Inspection Framework for AI-Generated Code
implication: Codigo atribuido a IA pode concentrar falhas severas e fail-soft; Forge deve ter risk audit gate fail-closed.

title: Governance Controls for AI-Generated Test Artifacts in Autonomous Software Testing
implication: Artefatos de teste gerados por IA precisam governanca, explicabilidade, risco, compliance e auditoria.

title: Agentic Much? Adoption of Coding Agents on GitHub
implication: Coding agents ja deixam rastros em PRs/commits; Forge deve capturar autoria, trace e risco por agente.

title: AIDev: Studying AI Coding Agents on GitHub
implication: Agent-authored PRs viraram objeto de estudo; o Forge deve produzir metadados de PR, evidencia e review.

title: Fingerprinting AI Coding Agents on GitHub
implication: Contribuicoes de agentes têm fingerprints; Forge deve registrar actor_agent_id e principal_id explicitamente.

title: Configuring Agentic AI Coding Tools: An Exploratory Study
implication: Context files dominam; skills e subagents ainda sao rasos. Forge deve transformar configuracao estatica em workflow executavel validavel.

title: What Security and Privacy Transparency Users Need from Consumer-Facing Generative AI
implication: Usuario comum precisa transparencia acionavel, on-demand e confiavel sobre seguranca e privacidade.

title: Generative AI in Saudi Arabia: A National Survey of Adoption, Risks, and Public Perceptions
implication: Adoção alta convive com baixa literacia, privacidade, misinformation e demanda por treinamento estruturado.

title: Taking a Pulse on How Generative AI is Reshaping the Software Engineering Research Landscape
implication: Usuarios tecnicos percebem ganho, mas pedem verificacao humana, governanca e mitigacao de risco.

title: MISRust: Mapping MISRA-C++ Coding Guidelines to the Rust Programming Language
implication: Safe Rust elimina parte relevante de classes de guideline, mas unsafe e APIs criticas exigem regras e lint explicito.

title: Model Context Protocol docs: What is MCP?
implication: MCP padroniza conexao de apps de IA a sistemas externos, dados, tools e workflows.

title: A2A Protocol docs
implication: A2A padroniza interoperabilidade agent-to-agent; MCP e A2A sao complementares.

title: GitHub Copilot cloud agent docs
implication: Demanda de mercado inclui custom agents, hooks, MCP, sandboxes, memory, budgets, audit logs, integrations e rollback.

title: clap derive docs
implication: CLI deve usar Parser, Subcommand e Args declarativos no lugar de parsing manual crescente.

title: tracing crate docs
implication: Spans e eventos estruturados devem ser a base de runtime trace e diagnostics.

title: thiserror crate docs
implication: Erros de biblioteca devem ser enums tipados com Display, source e From controlados.

title: Rust API Guidelines
implication: APIs publicas devem otimizar naming, predictability, interoperability, type safety e debuggability.
